Values._comment_storage: Target blob account (data storage). Authenticated via DefaultAzureCredential.
Values._comment_sp_paths: SP_SITE_PREFIX is stripped from FileRef when building blob names. Trailing slash optional.
Values._comment_schema: false = standard fields only (PoC). true = full ABB_Coll_* / NextECM_Mig_* schema with server-side $filter on LifecycleStatus.
